👤 Owner: erikmagkekse

📝 Repository: erikmagkekse/btrfs-nfs-csi

📄 Descrizione: Kubernetes Enterprise storage vibes for your homelab. A single-binary CSI driver that turns any Linux box with a btrfs disk into a full-featured storage backend(Agent) - instant snapshots, writable clones, per-volume quotas, live compression tuning, NoCOW for databases, and automatic NFS exports. Even with HA via DRBD. No iSCSI, no Ceph

⭐ Stelle: 22

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: Go

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-02-26T03:20:35Z
